action: Harden deterministic queue reconciliation against duplicate IDs, chronology reversal, status regression, and conflicting projections.
unresolved: Repository-wide projection discovery and artifact existence checks are not yet wired to the reconciler.
next_action: Build a repository-wide projection loader that resolves source commits and evidence paths, groups updates by queue item, invokes the reconciler, and emits a reversible materialization candidate without changing ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
